calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of John Ervin, Jr., To Perpetuate Testimony Of Jack Ervin By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances stated on the record.

The matter is not contested. The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

The Amended Petition of Jack Ervin to Perpetuate Testimony of John Ervin, Jr by Videotaped Deposition is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The Petition is denied as to Roberson Construction Co., Inc. and Comet Auto Supply, Inc. due to Petitioners' failure to file a proof of service as these parties. (Code Civ. Proc., Section 2035.040, subd. (a), (c).) The Petition is granted as to all other possible adverse parties identified within paragraph 11 of the Petition. Conditional Opposition filed by William & Burrows, Inc. Reply filed. Request for pre-deposition discovery is denied. Request that Petitioner pay "other costs" is denied; all deposition costs and fees will be borne consistent with CCP section 2025.510. Petitioner is to give 15 days' notice for Mr. Ervin's deposition. Lastly, all parties are to file a Special Notice of Appearance within two Court days.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: K. Septien. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff not present. (301/RCE)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of John Ervin, Jr., To Perpetuate Testimony Of Jack Ervin By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar May-28-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Petitioner's Petition to Perpetuate Testimony of Jack Ervin by Videotaped Deposition is OFF CALENDAR. Re-noticed for August 6, 2024. Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (301/RCE)
